name: Assault Cuirass
description: Forged in the depths of the nether reaches, this hellish mail provides an army with increased armor and attack speed.

abilities.name: Assault Aura
abilities.description: Increases the armor and attack speed of nearby allied units and buildings. Radius: 1200. Armor Bonus: 5. Attack Speed Bonus: 30. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Armor Reduction: 5. Also reduces the armor of nearby enemy units and buildings.
